task_objective: Add context-specific icons to toast notifications and update the main plugin icon.
design_decisions: Updated showToast helper to accept a logo parameter. Mapped operations (backup, restore, refresh, auto-sync) to relevant icons from react-icons/fa, io, and lu. Updated main sidebar icon to LuDatabaseBackup.
results: Toast notifications now include visual context via icons. The main plugin icon is updated to LuDatabaseBackup. Verified with build and protocol checks.
